challenges.title: Auto-Numbered FAQ
challenges.description: Create an FAQ page where each question is automatically numbered (Q1, Q2, Q3...) using CSS counters, with a custom color for the number.
hints: Use counter-reset on the FAQ container

challenges.title: Table of Contents
challenges.description: Build a table of contents that mirrors the section numbering of a document, generating numbered entries automatically.
hints: Style the ToC as a sidebar or inline

challenges.title: Recipe Step Counter
challenges.description: Create a recipe card where each step is numbered with large decorative numbers using CSS counters.
hints: Reset counter on the recipe container
Style ::before with large font size and color
Use a circle background behind the number
